## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build or tooling
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `black --check .`
- [ ] I ran `ruff check .`
- [ ] I ran `mypy knowledge_engine tests`
- [ ] I ran `pytest`
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` where needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risks, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
